news.summary: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) based in Seattle, has revealed plans to conduct a conference call on Thursday, May 1, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET to review its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The conference call will be broadcasted live and will include audio as well as accompanying slides. For those unable to join the live call, the content will be accessible for a minimum of three months on their investor relations webpage at www.amazon.com/ir.
news.headline: Amazon.com to webcast Q1 2025 financial results conference call on May 1, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET.

news.summary: Avangrid, Inc., part of the Iberdrola Group, a prominent energy company, recently revealed an expansion of its current Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with CPS Energy. The PPA now includes an added 159.2 Megawatts (MW) of capacity from the Peñascal power generation project. CPS Energy, the largest municipally-owned provider in the nation, has increased its energy procurement from Avangrid, elevating it from 160.8 MW to 320 MW. This enhancement signifies a doubling of CPS Energy's electricity acquisition from Avangrid.
news.headline: Avangrid and CPS Energy increase power purchase agreement by 159.2 MW, providing energy for 40,000 more San Antonio residents.

news.summary: In New York City on April 17, 2025, the popular Golden Retriever influencer known as #MarleyinNYC has excitedly shared news of a fresh collaboration. The beloved canine influencer from NYC has partnered with two prominent pet wellness companies, VetriScience® and Pet Naturals®. This new venture is set to bring quality products and valuable content to #MarleyinNYC's loyal following.
news.headline: #MarleyinNYC partners with VetriScience® and Pet Naturals® to promote pet wellness; partnership announced on April 17, 2025.

news.summary: Dublin-based pharmaceutical company Alkermes plc (Nasdaq: ALKS) has announced plans to hold a conference call and webcast on Thursday, May 1, 2025 at 8:00 a.m. ET (1:00 p.m. BST) to review its financial performance for the first quarter of the year. The call will provide insights into the company's earnings and progress, aiming to inform investors and stakeholders about its current standing. Interested parties can access the webcast player and related presentation slides for more details during the event.
news.headline: Alkermes (Nasdaq: ALKS) to report Q1 financial results on May 1, 2025, with a conference call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: Fairbanks, Alabama - On April 17, 2025, Contango ORE, Inc. disclosed the nomination of two independent directors to its Board, and revealed plans for the 2025 Annual Meeting. The company, listed on NYSE American as CTGO, aims to enhance its governance structure through these appointments.
news.headline: Contango ORE adds 2 new directors, sets 2025 Annual Meeting date.

news.summary: In 2025, Las Vegas Sands has extended its support for youth mentorship, scholarship, and community service programs through Sands Cares. The company has donated $100,000 to 100 Black Men as part of this initiative. This contribution highlights Sands' commitment to fostering positive development opportunities for young people and strengthening community engagement.
news.headline: Las Vegas Sands donates $100,000 to 100 Black Men Las Vegas for mentorship and scholarship programs.

news.summary: Raleigh, NC - On April 17, 2025, Dogwood State Bank (OTC: DSBX) shared its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The bank reported a notable increase in net income, reaching $7.4 million, which translates to $0.39 per diluted share for Q1 2025. These figures indicate a positive start to the year for Dogwood State Bank.
news.headline: Dogwood State Bank earns $7.4 million in first quarter of 2025, marking record earnings.

news.summary: RedHill Biopharma, based in Tel Aviv, Israel and Raleigh, North Carolina, received a Notification Letter from Nasdaq Capital Market on April 17, 2025. The letter does not currently impact the company's listing on the market or its business operations. The specifics of the notification and its consequences on the company's standing were not disclosed. The Notification Letter is a significant development for RedHill Biopharma and is being closely monitored by investors and stakeholders.
news.headline: RedHill Biopharma receives Nasdaq notification of stockholders' equity deficiency; no immediate effect on listing or operations.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, it was announced that Wendy Finerman, an Academy Award-winning producer, is joining forces with Jonathan E. Lim, a former star quarterback turned pioneering doctor and entrepreneur, to create an inspirational medical drama. City Hill Arts, the film and media production and financing company, will be partnering with them on this project. The collaboration between Finerman and Lim brings together their expertise in storytelling and healthcare, promising to deliver a unique and compelling series. This exciting venture combines the talents of two successful professionals from different fields and is set to make a significant impact on the entertainment industry.
news.headline: City Hill Arts to produce medical thriller "Chasing My Cure" based on Dr. David Fajgenbaum's life.Key numbers: 2 producers, 1 inspiring drama.

news.summary: In Denver on April 17, 2025, Lumen Technologies (NYSE: LUMN), a leading network provider for AI, announced that the company will release its financial results for the first quarter on May 1, 2025, after markets close. Interested parties can tune in to a live broadcast of the earnings conference call on the Investor Relations page.
news.headline: Lumen Technologies (NYSE: LUMN) to release Q1 financial results on May 1, 2025. Earnings call will be broadcast.

news.summary: China is set to liquidate $16 billion worth of Bitcoin, creating significant impact on the cryptocurrency market. This presents an opportunity for investors to enter the crypto mining space for steady income. ZA Miner, a cloud mining platform, is highlighted as a leader in this opportunity. They offer hassle-free mining of Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Litecoin without the need for expensive hardware or high energy costs. Features of ZA Miner include no upfront costs with a $100 mining contract for new users, and flexible contract options. This news is detailed further on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: China is liquidating $16 billion in Bitcoin, fueling market changes. Join ZA Miner for hassle-free mining. Features include no upfront costs and flexible contract options.

news.summary: An opportunity to earn a Bitcoin reward valued at around $85,000 has been presented for examining the ability of quantum computers to compromise the fundamental encryption of the blockchain.
news.headline: Does quantum computing pose a risk to Bitcoin? $85,000 bounty to test if it can break the encryption.

news.summary: US President Donald Trump criticized Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell for being slow to cut interest rates, urging for his termination on Truth Social on April 17. Florida Senator Rick Scott also called for new leadership at the Fed. Trump's public criticism of the Fed challenges its political independence, a longstanding convention in American politics. Powell, whose term expires in May 2026, emphasized Fed independence in an April 16 address. The Fed's decisions significantly impact financial markets, with post-pandemic dollar liquidity correlation to asset prices highlighted in an academic paper. Inflation moderation and trade war turmoil push for interest rate cuts, but Powell maintains a cautious approach. Real-time inflation via "truflation" indicates weaker cost pressures compared to the Fed's indicators, implying a potential rate cut in June, despite less than 10% chance in May. Fed's policy stance remains cautious for now.
news.headline: Trump criticizes Powell for slow interest rate cuts post ECB decision. Powell urged to step down amid Fed independence concerns. Pressure grows for Fed to cut rates amidst trade war turmoil and weak inflation signals. Fed expected to maintain wait-and-see approach in May with low chance of rate cut but increased expectations for June meeting. Fed's influence significant on financial markets post-COVID, shown through rising correlation between liquidity and asset prices, as per Kingston Univ. study.

news.summary: In Philadelphia on April 17, 2025, the Edna Bennett Pierce Prevention Research Center (PRC) at Penn State and ERPHealth, a behavioral health technology company in Philadelphia, revealed a collaboration to enhance prevention and early intervention efforts. This research partnership marks a significant milestone in the field, bringing together experts from the PRC and ERPHealth to drive innovation and address behavioral health challenges. The joint efforts will focus on leveraging data and technology to develop effective strategies. This initiative signals a strong commitment to addressing mental health issues and advancing research in the field.
news.headline: ERPHealth and Penn State collaborate to prevent substance use disorder, research partnership announced to advance prevention efforts.

news.summary: Zippo Manufacturing Company, based in Bradford, Pennsylvania, is set to release a new collection of cannabis-themed designs this April. In recognition of the cannabis culture holiday, 4/20, the company is launching a range of lighters and accessories inspired by the plant. Zippo, known for its iconic windproof lighters, aims to cater to enthusiasts with this bold and unique lineup. The diverse designs are expected to resonate with consumers looking for trendy and innovative products.
news.headline: Zippo releases limited-edition butane lighter insert for 4/20 with cannabis designs in Bradford, PA, on April 17, 2025.

news.summary: Sonic, a top provider of high-quality tool solutions and equipment, has unveiled OneSolution as its primary sales strategy, aiming to broaden its presence in the industrial and MRO sectors. This move comes as the company looks to expand its reach further in the market. The launch was announced on April 17, 2025, in Auburn, Alabama. Sonic's initiative targets enhancing its appeal to customers within these sectors, with the goal of boosting sales and market share. The company's emphasis on professional-grade tools underscores its commitment to delivering top-notch products.
news.headline: Sonic partners with OneSolution to boost U.S. manufacturing; expands tool solutions reach.

news.summary: In Northbrook, Illinois on April 17, 2025, Endevica Bio, a private company specializing in peptide drug development, disclosed initiating dosing for the initial participant in a Phase 2 trial for their novel drug TCMCB07 (B07). This drug aims to combat weight reduction by...
news.headline: Endevica Bio starts Phase 2 trial for TCMCB07 (B07) drug in metastatic colorectal cancer, first patient dosed.

news.summary: In Houston, VOC Energy Trust (NYSE: VOC) has announced the distribution of net profits for the quarterly period ending March 31, 2025. Unitholders recorded on April 30, 2025, are set to receive a total distribution of $2,210,000 or $0.13 per unit, to be paid out on May 15, 2025. During the payment period, sales volumes stood at 109,667 barrels for oil, 58,971 Mcf for natural gas, and 119,496 BOE in total. The average sales prices were recorded as follows: Oil ($X), Natural gas ($Y).
news.headline: VOC Energy Trust declares quarterly distribution of $2.21 million ($0.13 per unit) on record date April 30, payable May 15.

news.summary: VCs are looking for liquidity events in the growing crypto space due to increased adoption and positive regulatory developments. In the first quarter of this year, crypto startups raised over $4.90 billion, up from $3.62 billion in Q4 2024. While still below previous peaks, the recent uptick follows a successful 2024 for crypto VC firms. With the SEC set to clarify rules on digital assets, VCs are eyeing at least five potential IPOs this year. Companies like Animoca Brands, Telegram, Ionic Digital, Kraken, and Circle are in the spotlight. Circle, backed by Coinbase, filed for an IPO with an expected $5 billion valuation. This move comes as Bitcoin prepares for growth and VCs seek to meet investor expectations for returns. Former SEC Chair Gary Gensler's skepticism cast a funding shadow, but with improved market sentiment, these firms have a fair shot at success in the public markets.
news.headline: Blockchain IPOs set to take off with 5 firms ready to go public in 2025. $4.90 billion raised in Q1, up from $3.62 billion in Q4 2024. VC firms eye liquidity events. SEC clarity drives interest in digital assets. Circle files for IPO aiming for $5 billion valuation.

news.summary: Renowned Broadway composers will be presenting fresh, unheard songs and collaborating on new musical theatre projects with aspiring composers at the 2025 ASCAP Foundation Musical Theatre Fest in Los Angeles. Scheduled for April 17, 2025, the event is set to be led by a notable composer and lyricist. This opportunity will allow participants to engage with established professionals and showcase their talent in an immersive workshop setting.
news.headline: Stephen Schwartz hosts ASCAP Foundation Musical Theatre Fest on May 5-6 at The Wallis in Beverly Hills to share new works. Los Angeles, April 17, 2025 - Hit Broadway composers to showcase unheard gems and workshop with aspiring composers.

news.summary: Info-Tech Research Group has unveiled a lineup of the most popular software solutions, determined from user feedback via its SoftwareReviews platform across 270 software categories. The top-performing software solutions showcased outstanding satisfaction levels...
news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group reveals most loved software list based on user feedback from 270 categories.

news.summary: The Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP) recently broadened its recommendation on respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) vaccines for adults aged 50-59 at higher risk of RSV-associated lower respiratory tract disease (LRTD). Earlier in June 2024, ACIP delayed a vote on this recommendation pending more data. The updated guidance now covers Pfizer Inc.'s Abrysvo (Respiratory Syncytial Virus Vaccine) and GSK plc's Arexvy for adults aged 50-59 deemed vulnerable to severe RSV disease. The FDA approved Abrysvo in October 2024 for preventing RSV-associated LRTD in adults aged 18-59 at risk of severe illness. This decision marks an expansion of ACIP's previous stance.
news.headline: ACIP votes to recommend Pfizer, GSK's RSV vaccines for older adults under 60, expanding coverage for 50-59 age group.
US withdrawing hundreds of troops from Syria - NYT.

news.summary: Vagnone, an accomplished leader with vast experience in executive management and forming strategic alliances, has been appointed to a key role at Stepping Stones Museum for Children in Norwalk, Connecticut. The institution made the announcement on April 17, 2025. Stepping Stones, renowned for its interactive exhibits and educational programs, is a top children's museum in the state.
news.headline: Stepping Stones Museum in Connecticut appoints Frankie Vagnone as new CEO with extensive experience in leadership.

news.summary: During the tax season of 2025, the U.S. Treasury saw a significant boost in its cash balance compared to the previous year. On the U.S. tax filing deadline day, the Treasury's cash balance surged by $185 billion, marking the largest one-day increase since 2022. This increase in tax collections contributed to a substantial rise in overall tax receipts compared to 2024. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: U.S. Treasury cash balance surged by $185 billion during 2025's tax season, largest one-day increase since 2022.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Southern California experienced a 5.2 magnitude earthquake along with subsequent aftershocks. Despite this natural disaster, NetActuate declared that its data centers in Los Angeles were able to continue operations without any interruptions. This demonstrates the company's dedication to ensuring uninterrupted services even during challenging situations, helping maintain business continuity for its clients.
news.headline: NetActuate's LA data centers withstand 5.2 magnitude quake and aftershocks on April 14, 2025, remaining fully operational.

news.summary: A contractor based in Clinton Township, Michigan, is transforming winter emergencies into exceptional experiences by providing top-tier roofing and window solutions. As of April 17, 2025, the contractor is going above and beyond to assist Michigan homeowners facing harsh weather conditions and time constraints during the holiday season. Their expert services aim to elevate the overall experience for clients in need, demonstrating a commitment to quality and customer satisfaction in the construction industry.
news.headline: Shelby Construction Services in Clinton Township, MI provides expert roofing and window solutions to transform winter emergencies into five-star experiences for Michigan homeowners.

news.summary: Discover the stunning natural landscapes of Alaska and Western Canada through a combination of land and sea adventures with Azamara Cruises. Renowned for their immersive cultural experiences, the small-ship line offers seamless Cruisetour packages. Embark on a journey that includes extended stays in key destinations, allowing travelers to truly immerse themselves in the local culture. Get ready to explore the wild beauty of the region with this unique travel opportunity provided by Azamara Cruises.

news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, on April 17, 2025, a groundbreaking Human Nutritional Intervention Study conducted by King Abdulaziz University in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, in partnership with RCSI University of Medicine and Health reported a major breakthrough in public health. The study, a collaboration between the two institutions, revealed crucial insights for improving public health.
news.headline: Study in Saudi Arabia with King Abdulaziz University shows Omega-3 DHA foods boost public health.

news.summary: A groundbreaking project is set to be initiated by researchers from the University of Connecticut and Eascra Biotech at Kennedy Space Center. This venture aims to enhance nanomaterial production utilizing the International Space Station (ISS) National Lab. The researchers plan to focus on improving the manufacturing process for potential treatments of osteoarthritis and cancer. The project, scheduled to launch on April 17, 2025, signifies a significant step in nanotechnology research. Stay tuned for updates on this innovative initiative.
news.headline: Researchers to use ISS National Lab for nanomaterial production to develop osteoarthritis & cancer treatments.
Hamas Gaza Chief: Israeli hostages can be released if the Israeli government agrees to end war, fully withdraw from Gaza and allow for reconstruction of Gaza to begin.

news.summary: Uber's stock saw an increase past a significant level on Thursday, marking a positive end to the week as it finished higher. Analysts are recognizing the "countercyclical" potential of Uber. The stock's rise indicates a positive outlook for the company's performance in the market. This news comes from Investor's Business Daily, a reputable source for financial information.
news.headline: Uber stock rose above a key level, finishing the week higher, with analysts noting its 'countercyclical' potential.

news.summary: Shares of HPE surged following news that activist investor Elliott Management intends to push for the removal of Chief Executive Antonio Neri. The report suggests that Elliott Management is seeking to oust Neri from his position at HPE.
news.headline: Elliott Management seeks to remove HPE's CEO Antonio Neri, causing stock to rise.

news.summary: The Wyoming Stable Token Commission, authorized by the state to issue WYST stablecoin, may adjust language to comply with SEC guidelines. In a meeting, suggestions were made to mitigate the risk of WYST being classified as a security. The SEC had stated "covered stablecoins" were mostly non-securities. The commission plans to discuss this further in a May memo. Governor Mark Gordon aimed for a Q1 2025 launch but may delay to July. Wyoming is monitoring federal regulations on stablecoins, with proposed bills like the GENIUS Act and STABLE Act. Wyoming, with 600,000 people, attracts crypto firms with favorable regulations. Custodia Bank by Caitlin Long is in Cheyenne. Senator Cynthia Lummis supports crypto-friendly policies.
news.headline: Wyoming considers SEC rules for state-issued stablecoin; commission looks to clarify language to avoid being labeled security. Gov. plans stablecoin launch in July, monitoring federal bills on stablecoin regulation. Wyoming attracts crypto firms in regulatory-friendly environment. Senator Lummis advocates for crypto policies.

news.summary: Celebrates 15th Deal with Victory Automotive Group SOUTHLAKE, Texas, April 17, 2025 - Pinnacle Mergers & Acquisitions, a renowned auto dealership brokerage company, has finalized its latest transaction. The sale involves Ocean Honda of San Juan Capistrano in Orange County, marking their 15th successful deal. This significant milestone underscores Pinnacle's reputation in the industry. The exact financial details of the deal were not disclosed, but this transaction further solidifies Pinnacle Mergers & Acquisitions' position as a leading player in the market.
news.headline: Pinnacle Mergers & Acquisitions sells Ocean Honda to Jerry Seiner Auto Group, 15th transaction with Victory Automotive Group.

news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida on April 17, 2025, Scott Alexander Rose was recognized as a Pinnacle Achiever 2025 for his noteworthy accomplishments in the fields of Insurance, Education, and Philanthropy. Dr. Rose has been prominently featured in The Inner Circle for his outstanding contributions. He is celebrated for his dedication to education and his impactful efforts in philanthropy.
news.headline: Scott Alexander Rose recognized as a Pinnacle Achiever 2025 for his contributions to Insurance, Education, and Philanthropy.

news.summary: In Frankenmuth, Michigan, on April 17, 2025, Charles R. Kerns was recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member. He attained the Inner Circle of Excellence for his significant accomplishments in Safety Consulting and Public Service. Kerns, a prominent figure, has made impactful contributions in these fields, showcasing his expertise and commitment to improving safety measures.
news.headline: Charles R. Kerns recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for Safety Consulting & Public Service in The Inner Circle.

news.summary: During a meeting with Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni, President Donald Trump renewed his criticism of Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, suggesting he could replace him if rate cuts are not implemented soon. The meeting took place in the Oval Office and President Trump expressed dissatisfaction with Powell's handling of monetary policy, accusing him of maintaining high interest rates despite signals of disinflation in key sectors. He emphasized his discontent with Powell, stating "If I want him out, he'll be out of there real fast." Prime Minister Meloni praised Trump's global leadership role during the discussions, focusing on trade, China, Ukraine, and transatlantic relations. Trump's public criticism of Powell came just hours after Europe announced another round of policy easing. The President insisted that Powell is consistently "too late" in his decisions and accused him of playing politics. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Trump threatens to oust Powell from Fed if rate cuts don't happen soon. Trump criticizes Powell for holding rates high despite disinflation signals. Italy praises Trump's global role. More on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Toronto, April 17, 2025 - Inventus Mining Corp. (TSXV: IVS) has revealed plans to seek approval from the TSX Venture Exchange for an early warrant exercise incentive initiative. The program aims to prompt the early exercise of up to 15,000,000 existing common share purchase warrants (referred to as "Eligible Warrants") that were initially distributed during the private placement financing conducted on November 6th, 2024. Each Eligible Warrant allows the holder to buy one common share of Inventus at $0.09 per share and has a expiration date set for November 6th, 2026.
news.headline: Inventus Mining Corp. (TSXV: IVS) to apply for early warrant exercise program for up to 15M warrants at $0.09 each.
Hamas Gaza Chief: We're ready to immediately negotiate a deal to swap all hostages with an agreed number of Palestinians jailed by Israel.

news.summary: Goldman Sachs analyst John Mackay discussed Kinder Morgan, Inc. (NYSE: KMI) following the release of its first-quarter earnings. The energy infrastructure company reported revenue of $4.24 billion, falling short of the anticipated $4.08 billion. Adjusted quarterly earnings were 34 cents per share, missing analyst predictions of 35 cents per share. Kinder Morgan projects full-year 2025 earnings to be $1.27 per share, slightly lower than the $1.28 per share estimated by Benzinga Pro. The company expects net income attributable to increase by 8% from 2024. Mackay attributed the underperformance to weaker product performance. Access the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Goldman Sachs analyst positive on Kinder Morgan - Q1 revenue $4.24B, earnings 34 cents per share, 2025 EPS $1.27.

news.summary: In Toronto on April 17, 2025, Mattamy Group Corporation, recognized as one of the leading privately owned homebuilders in North America, disclosed significant operational figures for the quarter concluding on February 28, 2025. The company also released its financial data for the last twelve months for the same quarter.
news.headline: Mattamy Group Corp revealed Q3 2025 operating results, a major homebuilder in North America with LTM financials.

news.summary: A recent collaboration in Charlotte, North Carolina on April 17, 2025, has been established to prioritize the safety and preparedness of Texas students. The Texas Technology Alliance for Statewide Initiatives (TASI) has partnered with Securly to offer budget-friendly and creative strategies to school districts. This arrangement aims to ensure that students in Texas have a secure learning environment conducive to their educational needs, emphasizing the importance of innovative solutions.
news.headline: TASI partners with Securly for K-12 schools in Texas, ensuring safety and innovation, effective April 17, 2025.

news.summary: Investor sentiment turned negative in the stock market today after UnitedHealth's disappointing report and forecast for 2025. However, oil stocks saw a significant increase, with only a few showing signs of potential growth. Despite President Trump's threat to dismiss Fed Chair Powell, the S&P 500 and small-cap stocks both rose. The latest market movements were covered live by Investor's Business Daily, highlighting the contrasting performances of various sectors.
news.headline: Stocks rise despite Trump's threat to fire Fed Chair Powell; UnitedHealth report hurts market mood, oil stocks rally.

news.summary: A new toll-free national phone number, 1-844-DENIM99, has been introduced by Peace Over Violence in Los Angeles to commemorate the 26th anniversary of Denim Day, a global initiative working towards ending sexual violence. This launch is in line with Sexual Assault Awareness Month, helping individuals connect with support services and resources.
news.headline: National toll-free number 1-844-DENIM99 launched by Peace Over Violence for survivors to share stories during Sexual Assault Awareness Month.
